name: Catalan Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds Pork loin, diced into 1-inch pieces
2 Large Tomatoes, peeled, seeded, and chopped
3 Large Squid, cleaned and body sacs cut into rings
18 small Clams or mussels, well scrubbed
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean squid and cut body sacs into rings. Cut tentacles in half.
2. In a small saucepan, bring fish stock to a bare simmer.
3. Crush saffron and combine it with white wine in a small bowl.
4. Heat lard over moderately high heat in a flameproof casserole or paella pan.
5. Sauté chorizo and pork until browned.
6. Add onion, bell peppers, tomatoes, and squid; cook over moderate heat for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Stir in rice and cook for 1 minute, stirring.
8. Stir in almonds, pine nuts, garlic, saffron mixture, and artichoke hearts.
9. Ladle enough fish stock into the pan to just cover the rice mixture.
10. Bring to a boil and simmer covered for 20 minutes.
11. Arrange clams over the rice, add peas, and continue simmering until rice is tender and clams open (10-15 minutes).
12. Discard any unopened clams.
13. Garnish with pimientos and parsley.
